title: AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN ITEMS IN REPUBLIC ACTS NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN AND NINETEEN HUNDRED.

chunks.text:
H. No. 14654 / 63 OG No. 5, 1059 (January 30, 1967)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4592, June 19, 1965 ]

AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN ITEMS IN REPUBLIC ACTS NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN AND NINETEEN HUNDRED.
